posts.text:
Trump TORCHES reporter: “SHHHH… you are a very obnoxious person”🤣

Video

Jimmy Kimmel calls America a “ridiculous country”

Video

Jimmy Kimmel attacked Donald Trump and Melania at the Oscars tonight because his career is over and that’s all he can talk about at this point.

Trump Derangement Syndrome patient zero.

So pathetic.

Video

Disney Cruise Line released their new ad “Midnight Magic” during the Oscars on Sunday.

It swims through the journey of a dad and his son at evolving stages of life aboard trips on the cruise.

Family-centered, this ad plays emotionally and even magically.

Video

The only Awards Ceremony speech worth watching.

Greatest of all time.

Video

President Trump updates on Operation Epic Fury and the Islamic regime in Iran: “They want to negotiate badly, as they should, but I don’t think they’re ready to do what they have to do... We will finish the job.”

Video

President Trump on Air Force One says, “Something will happen with Cuba very quickly.”

This follows over a week of protests all over Cuba by freedom fighters who even set fire to the Communist Party headquarters.

Video

Conan O’Brien jokes during his opening monologue at the Oscars that there are no British nominees in the Best Actor or Actress categories since “they arrest their pedophiles.”

That’s a lie. Britain let illegals who preyed on women and children to go free.

Video

HYPOCRISY ALERT: Virginia Democrats passed gun control that “shall not apply to any member of the General Assembly.”

They’re taking away guns—but not theirs.

Video

104-year-old former Winston-Salem firefighter in North Carolina celebrated his birthday today with a surprise parade of fire trucks.

Robert Grier proudly stood up and waved.

He’s one of the first black firefighters to join his dept. He served 30 years.

Video

Nick Shirley: “I have the largest chain of daycares in the United States: The ‘learing’ centers… Defrauding the government is really easy if you can just enroll children into these daycares and help them lear.”

This is a skit—but this fraud does happen.

Video

Rep. Brandon Gill (R-TX) is right on point:

“If you are an illegal alien you shouldn’t be voting in American elections.”

“We’ve got to get the SAVE [America] Act passed.”

“This is the most common sense piece of legislation.”

“83% of Americans agree.”

Video

Bill Maher on Iran’s impotent Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei: “Four times he has traveled to a clinic in England to treat impotence. Yes, I love the Ayatollahs; they hate the infidel West until their d*ck doesn’t work.”

Khamenei has a low sperm count.

Video

High school in Maine being sued for not giving students opportunity to recite Pledge of Allegiance.

Local Army veteran says, “I think you should always do the Pledge of Allegiance in the high school. It’s what makes America, America. It’s part of being proud of our country.”

Video

Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu posts video of himself getting coffee as proof of life after a hoax circulated saying he had been killed.

Has anyone seen the new Supreme Leader of Iran?

Video

Sen. Bill Hagerty (R-TN) on point on the SAVE America Act: Why should there be an issue when over 80% of Americans want to see this? Let’s hear Democrats defend why we shouldn’t have Voter I.D. and why illegals should be allowed to vote in US elections.

Video

Pentagon ID’s the 6 U.S. airmen killed in a refueling tanker crash over Iraq this week:

Maj. John A. Klinner, 33
Capt. Ariana G. Savino, 31
Tech. Sgt. Ashley B. Pruitt, 34
Capt. Seth R. Koval, 38
Curtis J. Angst, 30
Tech. Sgt. Tyler H. Simmons, 28

RIP 🇺🇸

Video

Bus driver in PA with a “Make America Great Again” hat, says he got a choice to keep his job or his hat on.

Dave Bonhoff said “making America great is what we should all strive to be. Anybody who doesn’t want America to prosper, I take issue with them.”

Video

🎯


Donald J. Trump (@realDonaldTrump)

Never allow your attitude to be a liability. Be positive and strong. Set your mind on winning-- and keep it there.



— https://nitter.net/realDonaldTrump/status/431188704380465153#m
